title: Apple Inc. $AAPL Shares Acquired by Solidarity Wealth LLC
full_text: Solidarity Wealth LLC has increased its stake in Apple Inc. ($AAPL) by 2.1%, making it their largest holding. This comes as Apple exceeded Q1 earnings expectations, driven by strong iPhone 17 demand, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share. Various other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in AAPL, while analysts have reiterated "buy" ratings and raised price targets for the stock.
